title: Pleiarina plectilis
taxonomy: Pleiarina plectilis is a species of fungus in the family Hymenochaetaceae. It belongs to the genus Pleiarina and is classified as a type of resinous polypore mushroom. This classification places it within the larger group of ascomycete fungi. The family Hymenochaetaceae includes over 2,000 species of fungi, many of which are similar to P. plectilis in appearance. The classification of P. plectilis helps scientists to understand its evolutionary relationships and place it within the broader fungal kingdom.
